description: Slip into unparalleled comfort in these flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with an arty upper that makes it a stylish buy. Upper Soft PU straps with a twill tape toe separator, for abrasion-free comfort and to hold the foot in place Padded and textured footbed, ergonomically curved Printed footbed for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole with ergonomically styled grooves for absolute grip and traction Flip flop care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
